entry.title: Entry #316 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914

entry.title: Entry #315 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the 311 Motion to Seal. The Court hereby ORDERS that the Motion is GRANTED. (Clerk to enter the sealed and/or ex parte document as of the date of this order.) (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 5/29/2026) (jnp) (Entered: 05/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #314 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ORDER: Before the Court is the 288 Joint Motion to Compel that Apple, Inc and OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. filed on May 22, 2026. Each defendant may take up to ten depositions of Plaintiff, as the Court's April 30, 2026 Order (ECF No. 253 ) provides. Plaintiffs SHALL facilitate the depositions of their witnesses identified in the brief accompanying the Motion. Accordingly, the Court GRANTS the Motion. (Ordered by Magistrate Judge Hal R. Ray, Jr on 5/29/2026) (jnp) (Entered: 05/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #313 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914

entry.title: Entry #311 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: (Document Restricted) Unopposed Motion to Seal Limited Portions of Response to Plaintiffs' Rule 72(a) Objection (Sealed pursuant to motion to seal) filed by OpenAI OpCo, LLC, OpenAI, Inc., OpenAI, L.L.C. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Sealed Response to Plaintiffs' Rule 72(a) Objection, # 2 Proposed Sealed Appendix in Support of Sealed Response, # 3 Proposed Order Proposed Order Granting Motion to Seal)(Notice: Any required service of this document is the responsibility of the filer.) (Hancock, Katherine) (Entered: 05/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #306 in X Corp. v. Apple Inc., 4:25-cv-00914
entry.summary: ELECTRONIC ORDER granting 299 Application for Admission Pro Hac Vice of John Playforth. Important Reminder: Unless excused for cause, an attorney who is not an ECF user must register within 14 days of the date the attorney appears in a case pursuant to LR 5.1(f) and LCrR 49.2(g). (Ordered by Judge Mark Pittman on 5/28/2026)(chmb) (Entered: 05/28/2026)
